name: Abandoned Cart Recovery
description: 3-email recovery sequence with social proof and discount

steps.subject: {{first_name}}, you left something behind
steps.preview_text: Your cart is waiting for you
steps.body_html:
Did you forget something?

Hi {{first_name}}, it looks like you left some items in your cart. They're still waiting for you!

Complete your order before they sell out.
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, you left items in your cart. Complete your order before they sell out.

steps.subject: See why customers love these products
steps.preview_text: Don't just take our word for it
steps.body_html:
What Others Are Saying

Hi {{first_name}}, still thinking about those items in your cart? Here's what our customers have to say about them.

Join thousands of happy customers — complete your order today.
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, see what customers say about the items in your cart.

steps.subject: Last chance — 10% off your cart
steps.body_html:
Here's a Little Nudge

Hi {{first_name}}, we really think you'll love those items. To make it easier, here's 10% off your cart.

Use code: COMEBACK10

This offer expires in 24 hours.
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, 10% off your cart with code COMEBACK10. Expires in 24 hours.
